title: Secrets or PII in logs
recommendation: Never log secrets or PII. Use redaction and log sanitization.

title: Missing correlation IDs
recommendation: Include correlation or trace IDs in all logs and requests.

title: Retries without backoff
recommendation: Implement exponential backoff and jitter for retries.

title: Timeouts missing on external calls
recommendation: Always set timeouts for network and external service calls.

title: Noisy or excessive logging
recommendation: Reduce log verbosity and avoid logging in tight loops.
